mapper.insert: insert into student (name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, graduation_date, clazz_id, degree, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{no}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{isCollege}, #{address}, #{graduationDate}, #{clazzId}, #{degree}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
